purpose: Standard response shape for BuildSetu planning agent.

schema.detectedIntent: floor_plan | elevation | interior | exterior | structure | mep | boq | bbs | report | mixed

projectClassification.buildingType: residential | commercial | institutional | healthcare | hospitality | industrial | mixedUse | landscapeAndSite | unknown

planning.site: plot, road side, north, access, constraints

architecture.roomSchedule: array of room name, approximate size, position, access, notes

schema.imagePrompt: final image prompt only when ready

strictRules: Return valid JSON when API expects JSON.
Do not skip planning and jump directly to image prompt.
Do not invent exact structural sizes as final engineering design.
For floor plan image, prompt must say top-view 2D architectural plan.
If missing critical dimensions, use assumptions and mark them.
If unsafe or impossible, set rejected true and explain.
